form:Form.name: 133 - Totales por Conceptos y Periodos Por Legajo

form:Label.label: 133 - Totales por Conceptos y Periodos Por Legajo
form:Label.name: lbl_titulo

form:SButton.descrip: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.name: Delete

form:Button.descrip: Ejecutar el reporte con el criterio seleccionado
form:Button.label: Aceptar
form:Button.name: ACCEPT

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal as oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.d_empresa as EMPRESA, LIQ.oi_liquidacion as id, LIQ.c_liquidacion as COD, LIQ.d_titulo as DES, LIQ.e_periodo as PER FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as LIQ JOIN LIQ.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE LIQ.oi_liquidacion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
